{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LDbA1B8fph4ToJnbxPNH8e","type":"tool_result","content":"diff --git a/packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts b/packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts\nindex 729e81e..398a860 100644\n--- a/packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts\n+++ b/packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts\n@@ -13,13 +13,14 @@\n  * EN line then the ZH line of the same key, regardless of locale.\n  */\n import { execFileSync } from \"node:child_process\";\n-import { accessSync, constants, existsSync, mkdtempSync, readFileSync, readdirSync, statSync, writeFileSync } from \"node:fs\";\n+import { accessSync, constants, existsSync, lstatSync, mkdtempSync, readFileSync, readdirSync, readlinkSync, statSync, writeFileSync } from \"node:fs\";\n import { homedir, tmpdir } from \"node:os\";\n import { delimiter, join } from \"node:path\";\n import { agentInstalledByName as coreAgentInstalledByName, agentIsKnown, canonicalAgentName, type AgentEnv } from \"@roll/core\";\n import { resolveLang, t, v2Catalog, v3Catalog, type Lang } from \"@roll/spec\";\n import { repoRoot } from \"../bridge.js\";\n import { generateCatalog } from \"./skills.js\";\n+import { isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget } from \"./setup-shared.js\";\n import { collectExternalTools, renderExternalToolDoctorSection, type ExternalToolState } from \"../lib/external-tools.js\";\n import { collectToolReadinessDoctorRows, renderToolReadinessDoctorSection } from \"../lib/tool-readiness-doctor.js\";\n import { detectDesignHandoff, renderDesignNudge } from \"../lib/onboard-nudge.js\";\n@@ -299,6 +300,81 @@ function skillsCatalogSection(lang: Lang): void {\n   emit(`  ${t(v2Catalog, lang, drift ? \"skills.doctor_drift\" : \"skills.doctor_ok\")}`);\n }\n \n+// ── FIX-1042: agent skill-root pollution (auxiliary dirs mounted as skills) ──\n+function rollHomeDir(): string {\n+  return process.env[\"ROLL_HOME\"] ?? join(homedir(), \".roll\");\n+}\n+\n+export interface SkillRootPollution {\n+  agent: string;\n+  /** The polluting symlink path inside the agent's skills/ root. */\n+  link: string;\n+  /** Its target — a Roll-owned auxiliary skill-tree directory. */\n+  target: string;\n+}\n+\n+/**\n+ * Scan each configured agent's `skills/` root for auxiliary-directory pollution\n+ * — symlinks that point at Roll-owned auxiliary skill-tree directories under\n+ * `~/.roll/skills` (e.g. `docs`, `reports`). These are NOT auth/network\n+ * failures: the agent is installed and reachable; its skill root just carries\n+ * non-skill mounts an older `roll setup` created. Reuses the shared\n+ * setup-shared predicate so the auxiliary-dir policy never drifts.\n+ */\n+export function detectSkillRootPollution(configText: string, home: string): SkillRootPollution[] {\n+  const homeSkills = join(rollHomeDir(), \"skills\");\n+  const found: SkillRootPollution[] = [];\n+  for (const line of configText.split(\"\\n\")) {\n+    const idx = line.indexOf(\":\");\n+    if (idx === -1) continue;\n+    const key = line.slice(0, idx);\n+    if (!/^ai_/.test(key)) continue;\n+    const rawName = key.slice(\"ai_\".length);\n+    if (rawName === \"kimi_code\") continue; // dedupe (matches agentSection)\n+    if (!agentIsKnown(rawName)) continue;\n+    const name = canonicalAgentName(rawName);\n+    let dir = (line.slice(idx + 1).split(\"|\")[0] ?? \"\").replace(/^ /, \"\");\n+    if (dir.startsWith(\"~\")) dir = home + dir.slice(1);\n+    const skillsDir = join(dir, \"skills\");\n+    let entries: string[];\n+    try {\n+      entries = readdirSync(skillsDir);\n+    } catch {\n+      continue;\n+    }\n+    for (const entry of entries) {\n+      const link = join(skillsDir, entry);\n+      let target = \"\";\n+      try {\n+        if (!lstatSync(link).isSymbolicLink()) continue;\n+        target = readlinkSync(link);\n+      } catch {\n+        continue;\n+      }\n+      if (isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(target, homeSkills)) {\n+        found.push({ agent: name, link, target });\n+      }\n+    }\n+  }\n+  return found;\n+}\n+\n+function skillRootPollutionSection(lang: Lang): void {\n+  const cfg = rollConfigPath();\n+  if (!existsSync(cfg)) return;\n+  const polluted = detectSkillRootPollution(readFileSync(cfg, \"utf8\"), homedir());\n+  if (polluted.length === 0) return;\n+  emit(\"\");\n+  emit(t(v3Catalog, \"en\", \"doctor.skill_root_pollution\"));\n+  emit(t(v3Catalog, \"zh\", \"doctor.skill_root_pollution\"));\n+  emit(\"\");\n+  for (const { agent, link, target } of polluted) {\n+    emit(`  ⚠ ${agent}: ${link} → ${target}`);\n+  }\n+  emit(\"\");\n+  emit(`  ${t(v3Catalog, lang, \"doctor.skill_root_pollution_hint\")}`);\n+}\n+\n // ── FIX-234 AC3: all com.roll.* lanes — target path + load state, stale red ──\n export interface LaneProbe {\n   /** `launchctl list <label>` last-exit, or null when the job is not loaded. */\n@@ -513,6 +589,7 @@ export function doctorCommand(args: string[], deps: DoctorDeps = {}): number {\n \n a/packages/cli/src/commands/setup-shared.ts b/packages/cli/src/commands/setup-shared.ts\nindex ab17e69..5124a99 100644\n--- a/packages/cli/src/commands/setup-shared.ts\n+++ b/packages/cli/src/commands/setup-shared.ts\n@@ -66,6 +66,45 @@ export function rollPkgConventions(): string {\n   return join(rollPkgDir(), \"conventions\");\n }\n \n+// ─── auxiliary skill-tree directories (FIX-1042) ─────────────────────────────\n+/**\n+ * The Roll skills package ships a few directories that are NOT routable skills:\n+ * shared docs, generated reports, helper scripts, route-case fixtures, and\n+ * tests. They are mirrored into `~/.roll/skills` alongside the real `roll-*`\n+ * skills, but they must never be symlinked into an agent's `skills/` root —\n+ * agents such as Reasonix scan every entry there as a skill and warn that the\n+ * Markdown files have no `description:` frontmatter (FIX-1042).\n+ *\n+ * This is the single source of truth for the auxiliary-directory policy; setup\n+ * (skip + prune) and doctor (pollution report) both consult it so the policy\n+ * cannot drift between the two.\n+ */\n+export const AUXILIARY_SKILL_TREE_DIRS: readonly string[] = [\n+  \"docs\",\n+  \"reports\",\n+  \"scripts\",\n+  \"route-cases\",\n+  \"tests\",\n+];\n+\n+/** Is `name` an auxiliary (non-skill) Roll skill-tree directory? */\n+export function isAuxiliarySkillTreeDir(name: string): boolean {\n+  return AUXILIARY_SKILL_TREE_DIRS.includes(name);\n+}\n+\n+/**\n+ * Does `target` (a symlink target) point at a Roll-owned auxiliary skill-tree\n+ * directory directly under `homeSkillsDir` (i.e. `~/.roll/skills`)? Uses\n+ * path-boundary-safe component matching — the final path segment must equal an\n+ * auxiliary name AND its parent must be exactly `homeSkillsDir` — so loose\n+ * names like `docs-internal` or unrelated roots are never misclassified.\n+ */\n+export function isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(target: string, homeSkillsDir: string): boolean {\n+  if (target === \"\") return false;\n+  const normalized = target.endsWith(\"/\") ? target.slice(0, -1) : target;\n+  return dirname(normalized) === homeSkillsDir && isAuxiliarySkillTreeDir(basename(normalized));\n+}\n+\n // ─── _get_ai_tools (823) — ai_* entries with ~ expanded ──────────────────────\n export function getAiTools(): string[] {\n   const cfg = rollConfig();\n@@ -523,10 +562,13 @@ function linkSkills(): void {\n     ) {\n       continue;\n     }\n-    // Prune stale roll-* symlinks pointing into ~/.roll/skills no longer present.\n-    const homeSkillsPrefix = `${join(rollHome(), \"skills\")}/`;\n+    // Prune stale roll-* symlinks pointing into ~/.roll/skills no longer\n+    // present, and remove auxiliary-directory pollution mounted by older setup\n+    // (FIX-1042) — symlinks like `skills/docs → ~/.roll/skills/docs/` that\n+    // agents misread as undescribed skills.\n+    const homeSkills = join(rollHome(), \"skills\");\n+    const homeSkillsPrefix = `${homeSkills}/`;\n     for (const name of listDirEntries(skillsDir)) {\n-      if (!name.startsWith(\"roll-\")) continue;\n       const link = join(skillsDir, name);\n       if (lstatType(link) !== \"link\") continue;\n       let target = (name.startsWith(\"roll-\")) {\n+        if (target.startsWith(homeSkillsPrefix) && !existsSync(link)) {\n+          rmSync(link, { force: true });\n+        }\n+        continue;\n+      }\n+      // Non-skill entry: remove it when it is a Roll-owned auxiliary mount.\n+      if (isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(target, homeSkills)) {\n         rmSync(link, { force: true });\n       }\n     }\n-    // Create/repair per-skill symlinks.\n-    const homeSkills = join(rollHome(), \"skills\");\n+    // Create/repair per-skill symlinks — auxiliary skill-tree directories are\n+    // never mounted into an agent skills root (FIX-1042).\n     for (const skillName of listDirEntries(homeSkills)) {\n+      if (isAuxiliarySkillTreeDir(skillName)) continue;\n       const skillDir = `${join(homeSkills, b/packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts\n@@ -13,13 +13,14 @@\n  * EN line then the ZH line of the same key, regardless of locale.\n  */\n import { execFileSync } from \"node:child_process\";\n-import { agentInstalledByName as coreAgentInstalledByName, agentIsKnown, canonicalAgentName, type AgentEnv } from \"@roll/core\";\n import { resolveLang, t, v2Catalog, v3Catalog, type Lang } from \"@roll/spec\";\n import { repoRoot } from \"../bridge.js\";\n import { generateCatalog } from \"./skills.js\";\n+import { isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget } from \"./setup-shared.js\";\n import { collectExternalTools, renderExternalToolDoctorSection, type ExternalToolState } from \"../lib/external-tools.js\";\n import { collectToolReadinessDoctorRows, renderToolReadinessDoctorSection } from \"../lib/tool-readiness-doctor.js\";\n import { detectDesignHandoff, renderDesignNudge } from \"../lib/onboard-nudge.js\";\n@@ -299,6 +300,81 @@ function skillsCatalogSection(lang: Lang): void {\n   emit(`  ${t(v2Catalog, lang, drift ? \"skills.doctor_drift\" : \"skills.doctor_ok\")}`);\n }\n \n+// ── FIX-1042: agent skill-root pollution (auxiliary dirs mounted as skills) ──\n+function rollHomeDir(): string {\n+  return process.env[\"ROLL_HOME\"] ?? join(homedir(), \".roll\");\n+}\n+\n+export interface SkillRootPollution {\n+  agent: string;\n+  /** The polluting symlink path inside the agent's skills/ root. */\n+  link: string;\n+  /** Its target — a Roll-owned auxiliary skill-tree directory. */\n+  target: string;\n+}\n+\n+/**\n+ * Scan each configured agent's `skills/` root for auxiliary-directory pollution\n+ * — symlinks that point at Roll-owned auxiliary skill-tree directories under\n+ * `~/.roll/skills` (e.g. `docs`, `reports`). These are NOT auth/network\n+ * failures: the agent is installed and reachable; its skill root just carries\n+ * non-skill mounts an older `roll setup` created. Reuses the shared\n+ * setup-shared predicate so the auxiliary-dir policy never drifts.\n+ */\n+export function detectSkillRootPollution(configText: string, home: string): SkillRootPollution[] {\n+  const homeSkills = join(rollHomeDir(), \"skills\");\n+  const found: SkillRootPollution[] = [];\n+  for (const line of configText.split(\"\\n\")) {\n+    const idx = line.indexOf(\":\");\n+    if (idx === -1) continue;\n+    const key = line.slice(0, idx);\n+    if (!/^ai_/.test(key)) continue;\n+    const rawName = key.slice(\"ai_\".length);\n+    if (rawName === \"kimi_code\") continue; // dedupe (matches agentSection)\n+    if (!agentIsKnown(rawName)) continue;\n+    const name = canonicalAgentName(rawName);\n+    let dir = (line.slice(idx + 1).split(\"|\")[0] ?? \"\").replace(/^ /, \"\");\n+    if (dir.startsWith(\"~\")) dir = home + dir.slice(1);\n+    const skillsDir = join(dir, \"skills\");\n+    let entries: string[];\n+    try {\n+      entries = readdirSync(skillsDir);\n+    } catch {\n+      continue;\n+    }\n+    for (const entry of entries) {\n+      const link = join(skillsDir, entry);\n+      let target = \"\";\n+      try {\n+        if (!lstatSync(link).isSymbolicLink()) continue;\n+        target = readlinkSync(link);\n+      } catch {\n+        continue;\n+      }\n+      if (isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(target, homeSkills)) {\n+        found.push({ agent: name, link, target });\n+      }\n+    }\n+  }\n+  return found;\n+}\n+\n+function skillRootPollutionSection(lang: Lang): void {\n+  const cfg = rollConfigPath();\n+  if (!existsSync(cfg)) return;\n+  const polluted = detectSkillRootPollution(readFileSync(cfg, \"utf8\"), homedir());\n+  if (polluted.length === 0) return;\n+  emit(\"\");\n+  emit(t(v3Catalog, \"en\", \"doctor.skill_root_pollution\"));\n+  emit(t(v3Catalog, \"zh\", \"doctor.skill_root_pollution\"));\n+  emit(\"\");\n+  for (const { agent, link, target } of polluted) {\n+    emit(`  ⚠ ${agent}: ${link} → ${target}`);\n+  }\n+  emit(\"\");\n+  emit(`  ${t(v3Catalog, lang, \"doctor.skill_root_pollution_hint\")}`);\n+}\n+\n // ── FIX-234 AC3: all com.roll.* lanes — target path + load state, stale red ──\n export interface LaneProbe {\n   /** `launchctl list <label>` last-exit, or null when the job is not loaded. */\n@@ -513,6 +589,7 @@ export function doctorCommand(args: string[], deps: DoctorDeps = {}): number {\n \n   if (!toolsOnly) {\n     agentSection(p);\n+    skillRootPollutionSection(lang);\n     prSection(lang);\n     skillsCatalogSection(lang);\n     lanesSection(lang, realLaneProbe());\ndiff --git a/packages/cli/src/commands/setup-shared.ts b/packages/cli/src/commands/setup-shared.ts\nindex ab17e69..5124a99 100644\n--- a/packages/cli/src/commands/setup-shared.ts\n+++ b/packages/cli/src/commands/setup-shared.ts\n@@ -66,6 +66,45 @@ export function rollPkgConventions(): string {\n   return join(rollPkgDir(), \"conventions\");\n }\n \n+// ─── auxiliary skill-tree directories (FIX-1042) ─────────────────────────────\n+/**\n+ * The Roll skills package ships a few directories that are NOT routable skills:\n+ * shared docs, generated reports, helper scripts, route-case fixtures, and\n+ * tests. They are mirrored into `~/.roll/skills` alongside the real `roll-*`\n+ * skills, but they must never be symlinked into an agent's `skills/` root —\n+ * agents such as Reasonix scan every entry there as a skill and warn that the\n+ * Markdown files have no `description:` frontmatter (FIX-1042).\n+ *\n+ * This is the single source of truth for the auxiliary-directory policy; setup\n+ * (skip + prune) and doctor (pollution report) both consult it so the policy\n+ * cannot drift between the two.\n+ */\n+export const AUXILIARY_SKILL_TREE_DIRS: readonly string[] = [\n+  \"docs\",\n+  \"reports\",\n+  \"scripts\",\n+  \"route-cases\",\n+  \"tests\",\n+];\n+\n+/** Is `name` an auxiliary (non-skill) Roll skill-tree directory? */\n+export function isAuxiliarySkillTreeDir(name: string): boolean {\n+  return AUXILIARY_SKILL_TREE_DIRS.includes(name);\n+}\n+\n+/**\n+ * Does `target` (a symlink target) point at a Roll-owned auxiliary skill-tree\n+ * directory directly under `homeSkillsDir` (i.e. `~/.roll/skills`)? Uses\n+ * path-boundary-safe component matching — the final path segment must equal an\n+ * auxiliary name AND its parent must be exactly `homeSkillsDir` — so loose\n+ * names like `docs-internal` or unrelated roots are never misclassified.\n+ */\n+export function isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(target: string, homeSkillsDir: string): boolean {\n+  if (target === \"\") return false;\n+  const normalized = target.endsWith(\"/\") ? target.slice(0, -1) : target;\n+  return dirname(normalized) === homeSkillsDir && isAuxiliarySkillTreeDir(basename(normalized));\n+}\n+\n // ─── _get_ai_tools (823) — ai_* entries with ~ expanded ──────────────────────\n export function getAiTools(): string[] {\n   const cfg = rollConfig();\n@@ -523,10 +562,13 @@ function linkSkills(): void {\n     ) {\n       continue;\n     }\n-    // Prune stale roll-* symlinks pointing into ~/.roll/skills no longer present.\n-    const homeSkillsPrefix = `${join(rollHome(), \"skills\")}/`;\n+    // Prune stale roll-* symlinks pointing into ~/.roll/skills no longer\n+    // present, and remove auxiliary-directory pollution mounted by older setup\n+    // (FIX-1042) — symlinks like `skills/docs → ~/.roll/skills/docs/` that\n+    // agents misread as undescribed skills.\n+    const homeSkills = join(rollHome(), \"skills\");\n+    const homeSkillsPrefix = `${homeSkills}/`;\n     for (const name of listDirEntries(skillsDir)) {\n-      if (!name.startsWith(\"roll-\")) continue;\n       const link = join(skillsDir, name);\n       if (lstatType(link) !== \"link\") continue;\n       let target = Non-skill entry: remove it when it is a Roll-owned auxiliary mount.\n+      if (isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(target, homeSkills)) {\n         rmSync(link, { force: true });\n       }\n     }\n-    // Create/repair per-skill symlinks.\n-    const homeSkills = join(rollHome(), \"skills\");\n+    // Create/repair per-skill symlinks — auxiliary skill-tree directories are\n+    // never mounted into an agent skills root (FIX-1042).\n     for (const skillName of listDirEntries(homeSkills)) {\n+      if (isAuxiliarySkillTreeDir(skillName)) continue;\n       const skillDir = `${join(homeSkills, a/packages/cli/test/skill-root-pollution.test.ts b/packages/cli/test/skill-root-pollution.test.ts\nnew file mode 100644\nindex 0000000..9ba4945\n--- /dev/null\n+++ b/packages/cli/test/skill-root-pollution.test.ts\n@@ -0,0 +1,86 @@\n+/**\n+ * FIX-1042: auxiliary skill-tree directories must never be mounted as skills.\n+ *\n+ * Two layers are covered here, both reading from the single shared policy in\n+ * setup-shared so doctor and setup cannot drift:\n+ *   - the path-boundary-safe predicate (`isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget`), incl. the\n+ *     `docs-internal` lookalike the prior `agy` review flagged; and\n+ *   - `roll doctor`'s pollution detector, which must report a polluted skill\n+ *     root WITHOUT treating the agent as auth/network-blocked.\n+ */\n+import { mkdirSync, mkdtempSync, symlinkSync, writeFileSync } from \"node:fs\";\n+import { tmpdir } from \"node:os\";\n+import { join } from \"node:path\";\n+import { afterEach, beforeEach, describe, expect, it } from \"vitest\";\n+import { isAuxiliarySkillTreeDir, isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget } from \"../src/commands/setup-shared.js\";\n+import { detectSkillRootPollution } from \"../src/commands/doctor.js\";\n+\n+describe(\"FIX-1042 auxiliary-dir policy (shared predicate)\", () => {\n+  it(\"classifies the five auxiliary skill-tree directories\", () => {\n+    for (const aux of [\"docs\", \"reports\", \"scripts\", \"route-cases\", \"tests\"]) {\n+      expect(isAuxiliarySkillTreeDir(aux)).toBe(true);\n+    }\n+    expect(isAuxiliarySkillTreeDir(\"roll-build\")).toBe(false);\n+    expect(isAuxiliarySkillTreeDir(\"docs-internal\")).toBe(false);\n+  });\n+\n+  it(\"matches auxiliary symlink targets path-boundary-safely\", () => {\n+    const homeSkills = \"/home/u/.roll/skills\";\n+    expect(isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(\"/home/u/.roll/skills/docs/\", homeSkills)).toBe(true);\n+    expect(isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(\"/home/u/.roll/skills/reports\", homeSkills)).toBe(true);\n+    // Lookalike name → NOT auxiliary (loose-prefix trap the prior review caught).\n+    expect(isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(\"/home/u/.roll/skills/docs-internal/\", homeSkills)).toBe(false);\n+    // Different parent root → not ours.\n+    expect(isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(\"/home/u/.roll/skills-other/docs\", homeSkills)).toBe(false);\n+    expect(isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(\"/home/u/.roll/skills/roll-build/\", homeSkills)).toBe(false);\n+    expect(isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(\"\", homeSkills)).toBe(false);\n+  });\n+});\n+\n+describe(\"FIX-1042 roll doctor skill-root pollution detector\", () => {\n+  let home = \"\";\n+  const saved = process.env[\"ROLL_HOME\"];\n+\n+  beforeEach(() => {\n+    home = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), \"roll-pollution-\"));\n+    process.env[\"ROLL_HOME\"] = join(home, \".roll\");\n+    mkdirSync(join(home, \".roll\", \"skills\", \"docs\"), { recursive: true });\n+    mkdirSync(join(home, \".roll\", \"skills\", \"roll-build\"), { recursive: true });\n+  });\n+  afterEach(() => {\n+    if (saved === undefined) delete process.env[\"ROLL_HOME\"];\n+    else process.env[\"ROLL_HOME\"] = saved;\n+  });\n+\n+  const cfg = \"ai_reasonix: ~/.reasonix|AGENTS.md|AGENTS.md\\n\";\n+\n+  it(\"reports an auxiliary mount in an agent skill root\", () => {\n+    const rxSkills = join(home, \".reasonix\", \"skills\");\n+    mkdirSync(rxSkills, { recursive: true });\n+    symlinkSync(`${join(home, \".roll\", \"skills\", \"docs\")}/`, join(rxSkills, \"docs\"));\n+    symlinkSync(`${join(home, \".roll\", \"skills\", \"roll-build\")}/`, join(rxSkills, \"roll-build\"));\n+\n+    const found = detectSkillRootPollution(cfg, home);\n+    expect(found).toHaveLength(1);\n+    expect(found[0]?.agent).toBe(\"reasonix\");\n+    expect(found[0]?.link).toBe(join(rxSkills, \"docs\"));\n+  });\n+\n+  it(\"reports nothing for a clean skill root (no false auth signal)\", () => {\n+    const rxSkills = join(home, \".reasonix\", \"skills\");\n+    mkdirSync(rxSkills, { recursive: true });\n+    symlinkSync(`${join(home, \".roll\", \"skills\", \"roll-build\")}/`, join(rxSkills, \"roll-build\"));\n+    expect(detectSkillRootPollution(cfg, home)).toEqual([]);\n+  });\n+\n+  it(\"reports nothing when the agent skills root is absent\", () => {\n+    expect(detectSkillRootPollution(cfg, home)).toEqual([]);\n+  });\n+\n+  it(\"ignores a real user-authored skill placed in the root\", () => {\n+    const rxSkills = join(home, \".reasonix\", \"skills\");\n+    mkdirSync(join(rxSkills, \"my-skill\"), { recursive: true });\n+    writeFileSync(join(rxSkills, \"my-skill\", \"SKILL.md\"), \"---\\nname: my-skill\\ndescription: x\\n---\\n\");\n+    expect(detectSkillRootPollution(cfg, home)).toEqual([]);\n+  });\n+});\ndiff --git a/packages/spec/src/i18n/catalog-v3.ts b/packages/spec/src/i18n/catalog-v3.ts\nindex 89add8a..22b8734 100644\n--- \"roll-beta\")).isSymbolicLink()).toBe(true);\n }\n \n describe(\"frozen: roll setup\", () => {\n@@ -377,6 +392,41 @@ describe(\"frozen: roll setup\", () => {\n     assertFreshSideEffects(fx);\n   });\n \n+  it(\"FIX-1042: reasonix skill root mounts skills but filters auxiliary dirs\", () => {\n+    const fx = freshFixture();\n+    mkdirSync(join(fx.home, \".reasonix\"), { recursive: true });\n+    tsSetup(fx, [], { ROLL_LANG: \"en\" });\n+    const rxSkills = join(fx.home, \".reasonix\", \"skills\");\n+    // Real skills are mounted as symlinks.\n+    expect(lstatSync(join(rxSkills, \"roll-alpha\")).isSymbolicLink()).toBe(true);\n+    expect(lstatSync(join(rxSkills, \"roll-beta\")).isSymbolicLink()).toBe(true);\n+    // Auxiliary skill-tree directories are NOT mounted — Reasonix would have\n+    // scanned them as undescribed skills and warned (FIX-1042).\n+    for (const aux of [\"docs\", \"reports\", \"scripts\", \"route-cases\", \"tests\"]) {\n+      expect(existsSync(join(rxSkills, aux))).toBe(false);\n+    }\n+  });\n+\n+  it(\"FIX-1042: re-run removes stale auxiliary pollution, preserves real & lookalike skills\", () => {\n+    const fx = freshFixture();\n+    mkdirSync(join(fx.home, \".reasonix\"), { recursive: true });\n+    tsSetup(fx, [], { ROLL_LANG: \"en\" });\n+    const rxSkills = join(fx.home, \".reasonix\", \"skills\");\n+    // Simulate an older setup that mounted an auxiliary dir and a lookalike.\n+    const stale = join(rxSkills, \"docs\");\n+    symlinkSync(`${join(fx.home, \".roll\", \"skills\", \"docs\")}/`, stale);\n+    const lookalike = join(rxSkills, \"docs-internal\");\n+    symlinkSync(`${join(fx.home, \".roll\", \"skills\", \"docs-internal\")}/`, lookalike);\n+    expect(lstatSync(stale).isSymbolicLink()).toBe(true);\n+    // Re-run setup.\n+    tsSetup(fx, [], { ROLL_LANG: \"en\" });\n+    // Auxiliary pollution is removed; the path-boundary-safe match leaves the\n+    // `docs-internal` lookalike untouched, and real skills survive.\n+    expect(existsSync(stale)).toBe(false);\n+    expect(lstatSync(lookalike).isSymbolicLink()).toBe(true);\n+    expect(lstatSync(join(rxSkills, \"roll-alpha\")).isSymbolicLink()).toBe(true);\n+  });\n+\n   it(\"missing conventions source is owned by TS without bash fallback\", () => {\n     const missingPkg = realpathSync(mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), \"roll-setup-missing-pkg-\")));\n     dirs.push(missingPkg);\ndiff --git a/packages/cli/test/skill-root-pollution.test.ts b/packages/cli/test/skill-root-pollution.test.ts\nnew file mode 100644\nindex 0000000..9ba4945\n--- /dev/null\n+++ b/packages/cli/test/skill-root-pollution.test.ts\n@@ -0,0 +1,86 @@\n+/**\n+ * FIX-1042: auxiliary skill-tree directories must never be mounted as skills.\n+ *\n+ * Two layers are covered here, both reading from the single shared policy in\n+ * setup-shared so doctor and setup cannot drift:\n+ *   - the path-boundary-safe predicate (`isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget`), incl. the\n+ *     `docs-internal` lookalike the prior `agy` review flagged; and\n+ *   - `roll doctor`'s pollution detector, which must report a polluted skill\n+ *     root WITHOUT treating the agent as auth/network-blocked.\n+ */\n+import { mkdirSync, mkdtempSync, symlinkSync, writeFileSync } from \"node:fs\";\n+import { tmpdir } from \"node:os\";\n+import { join } from \"node:path\";\n+import { afterEach, beforeEach, describe, expect, it } from \"vitest\";\n+import { isAuxiliarySkillTreeDir, isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget } from \"../src/commands/setup-shared.js\";\n+import { detectSkillRootPollution } from \"../src/commands/doctor.js\";\n+\n+describe(\"FIX-1042 auxiliary-dir policy (shared predicate)\", () => {\n+  it(\"classifies the five auxiliary skill-tree directories\", () => {\n+    for (const aux of [\"docs\", \"reports\", \"scripts\", \"route-cases\", \"tests\"]) {\n+      expect(isAuxiliarySkillTreeDir(aux)).toBe(true);\n+    }\n+    expect(isAuxiliarySkillTreeDir(\"roll-build\")).toBe(false);\n+    expect(isAuxiliarySkillTreeDir(\"docs-internal\")).toBe(false);\n+  });\n+\n+  it(\"matches auxiliary symlink targets path-boundary-safely\", () => {\n+    const homeSkills = \"/home/u/.roll/skills\";\n+    expect(isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(\"/home/u/.roll/skills/docs/\", homeSkills)).toBe(true);\n+    expect(isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(\"/home/u/.roll/skills/reports\", homeSkills)).toBe(true);\n+    // Lookalike name → NOT auxiliary (loose-prefix trap the prior review caught).\n+    expect(isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(\"/home/u/.roll/skills/docs-internal/\", homeSkills)).toBe(false);\n+    // Different parent root → not ours.\n+    expect(isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(\"/home/u/.roll/skills-other/docs\", homeSkills)).toBe(false);\n+    expect(isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(\"/home/u/.roll/skills/roll-build/\", homeSkills)).toBe(false);\n+    expect(isRollAuxiliarySkillTarget(\"\", homeSkills)).toBe(false);\n+  });\n+});\n+\n+describe(\"FIX-1042 roll doctor skill-root pollution detector\", () => {\n+  let home = \"\";\n+  const saved = process.env[\"ROLL_HOME\"];\n+\n+  beforeEach(() => {\n+    home = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), \"roll-pollution-\"));\n+    process.env[\"ROLL_HOME\"] = join(home, \".roll\");\n+    mkdirSync(join(home, \".roll\", \"skills\", \"docs\"), { recursive: true });\n+    mkdirSync(join(home, \".roll\", \"skills\", \"roll-build\"), { recursive: true });\n+  });\n+  afterEach(() => {\n+    if (saved === undefined) delete process.env[\"ROLL_HOME\"];\n+    else process.env[\"ROLL_HOME\"] = saved;\n+  });\n+\n+  const cfg = \"ai_reasonix: ~/.reasonix|AGENTS.md|AGENTS.md\\n\";\n+\n+  it(\"reports an auxiliary mount in an agent skill root\", () => {\n+    const rxSkills = join(home, \".reasonix\", \"skills\");\n+    mkdirSync(rxSkills, { recursive: true });\n+    symlinkSync(`${join(home, \".roll\", \"skills\", \"docs\")}/`, join(rxSkills, \"docs\"));\n+    symlinkSync(`${join(home, \".roll\", \"skills\", \"roll-build\")}/`, join(rxSkills, \"roll-build\"));\n+\n+    const found = detectSkillRootPollution(cfg, home);\n+    expect(found).toHaveLength(1);\n+    expect(found[0]?.agent).toBe(\"reasonix\");\n+    expect(found[0]?.link).toBe(join(rxSkills, \"docs\"));\n+  });\n+\n+  it(\"reports nothing for a clean skill root (no false auth signal)\", () => {\n+    const rxSkills = join(home, \".reasonix\", \"skills\");\n+    mkdirSync(rxSkills, { recursive: true });\n+    symlinkSync(`${join(home, \".roll\", \"skills\", \"roll-build\")}/`, join(rxSkills, \"roll-build\"));\n+    expect(detectSkillRootPollution(cfg, home)).toEqual([]);\n+  });\n+\n+  it(\"reports nothing when the agent skills root is absent\", () => {\n+    expect(detectSkillRootPollution(cfg, home)).toEqual([]);\n+  });\n+\n+  it(\"ignores a real user-authored skill placed in the root\", () => {\n+    const rxSkills = join(home, \".reasonix\", \"skills\");\n+    mkdirSync(join(rxSkills, \"my-skill\"), { recursive: true });\n+    writeFileSync(join(rxSkills, \"my-skill\", \"SKILL.md\"), \"---\\nname: my-skill\\ndescription: x\\n---\\n\");\n+    expect(detectSkillRootPollution(cfg, home)).toEqual([]);\n+  });\n+});\ndiff --git a/packages/spec/src/i18n/catalog-v3.ts b/packages/spec/src/i18n/catalog-v3.ts\nindex 89add8a..22b8734 100644\n--- a/packages/spec/src/i18n/catalog-v3.ts\n+++ b/packages/spec/src/i18n/catalog-v3.ts\n@@ -502,4 +502,14 @@ export const v3Catalog: Catalog = {\n     en: \"Not a git repository — `roll loop` needs a git repo with a pushable GitHub remote.\",\n     zh: \"不是 git 仓库 — `roll loop` 需要一个带有可推送 GitHub remote 的 git 仓库。\",\n   },\n+\n+  // FIX-1042: agent skill-root pollution (auxiliary dirs mounted as skills)\n+  \"doctor.skill_root_pollution\": {\n+    en: \"Polluted agent skill roots (auxiliary directories mounted as skills)\",\n+    zh: \"受污染的 agent skill 根目录（辅助目录被当作 skill 挂载）\",\n+  },\n+  \"doctor.skill_root_pollution_hint\": {\n+    en: \"These are Roll docs/reports, not skills — re-run `roll setup` to remove them so agents stop warning about missing descriptions.\",\n+    zh: \"这些是 Roll 文档/报告，不是 skill —— 重新运行 `roll setup` 即可移除，agent 将不再报告缺少 description 的警告。\",\n+  },\n };","stderr":"","interrupted":false,"isImage":false,"noOutputExpected":false}}
